name: open-design
description: Create websites, product prototypes, presentations, design systems, media, and web-first documents from choice-only briefs with Open Design.

interface.shortDescription: Create eight artifact types from guided choices.
interface.longDescription: Use Open Design Basics plus a focused skill to create websites, product prototypes, presentations, design systems, images, videos, audio, and web-first documents. Confirm a choice-only brief, review real progress and output in the host, then open Open Design studio for detailed editing, versions, and export. Document V1 delivers Markdown plus print-ready HTML rather than native DOCX.
defaultPrompt: Create a responsive website through a choice-only brief.
Turn this product idea into an interactive prototype.
Create a presentation with a coherent visual system.
Extract a reusable design system from this reference.
Generate a campaign image in the format I choose.
Create a short product video with selectable pacing and aspect.
Produce an audio track with selectable type, duration, and direction.
Create a web-first report with Markdown and print-ready HTML.
